Meaning.En: A large area of land that is very dry and has little vegetation, such as the Sahara or the Mojave.
Meaning.Example: The camel can survive for weeks in the desert without water.

Situation.Vi: Mô tả môi trường khắc nghiệt, khô hạn, ít cây cối.
Situation.En: Describing a harsh, arid environment with minimal plant life.

Meaning.Vi: bỏ rơi, bỏ chạy khỏi (đặc biệt là quân đội, nghĩa vụ)
Meaning.En: To abandon a person, cause, or duty, especially a military post or responsibility.
Meaning.Example: The soldier was court-martialed for deserting his unit during the battle.

Situation.Vi: Nhân viên hoặc binh sĩ bỏ nhiệm vụ mà không xin phép.
Situation.En: A soldier or employee abandoning their post or duty without permission.

Meaning.Vi: bỏ mặc, bỏ lại (người thân, trách nhiệm…)
Meaning.En: To leave someone or something behind, especially when they need support.
Meaning.Example: He felt abandoned when his wife deserted him and their children.

Situation.Vi: Bỏ rơi người thân trong lúc khó khăn, thiếu trách nhiệm.
Situation.En: Leaving a loved one in a time of need, often with emotional or financial consequences.
